fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of activity, such as Put-away, that the warehouse performs on the lines that are attached to the header.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse header.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where the warehouse activity takes place.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.

fields.name: Assignment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Assignment Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Sorting Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method by which the lines are sorted on the warehouse header, such as Item or Document.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in the warehouse activity document.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity should be recorded as being posted.

fields.name: Breakbulk Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the intermediate Take and Place lines will not show as put-away, pick, or movement lines, when the quantity in the larger unit of measure is being put-away, picked or moved completely.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about the type of destination, such as customer or vendor, associated with the warehouse activity.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or the code of the customer or vendor that the line is linked to.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date you expect the items to be available in your warehouse. If you leave the field blank, it will be calculated as follows: Planned Receipt Date + Safety Lead Time + Inbound Warehouse Handling Time = Expected Receipt Date.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: External Document No.2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Do Not Fill Qty. to Handle
